shape_decode: cmp=L, vp=W, vpc=_, naive=L : value_profile resolves; cmplog AND naive block; value_profile_cmplog non-decisive => a BARE VP CMP_MAP operand-distance gradient that I2S substitution (cmplog) AND blind havoc (naive) both fail to climb.
label_source: Layer-1 resolve pattern (cmp,vp,vpc,naive)=(L,W,_,L). The only technique present in the winner (value_profile) and absent in the decisive loser (naive, and cmplog which carries I2S but no CMP_MAP gradient) is value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient feedback. The Layer-1 attribution is therefore 'bare VP gradient'; THIS test is the independent real-data verification (G2) of HOW that gradient manifests in the corpus.
round0_outcome: Round-0 bet the whole shape on ONE descriptor family -- value_distance_reached (scalar/per-byte Hamming residual to a fixed gate operand), split into a literal-assembly hypothesis and a numeric-threshold hypothesis. Real-data arbitration: 4/7 VALIDATED via value_distance (sqlite3_14438 '>>', sqlite3_15242 '>=', sqlite3_15515 '=', lcms_2141 'scnr'), but ALL on width<=4 short operands flagged chance-alignment-prone; 3/7 INCONCLUSIVE -- sqlite3_14777 (unmeasurable: token-CLASS operand, no single literal for value_distance_reached to align), lcms_2446 (unmeasurable: numeric-threshold field parser not built), libxml2_6756 (rule_not_met: scalar value-distance scored but did NOT hold -- the '<![CDATA[' opener is assembled, not approached by per-byte Hamming residual). Round-2 PIVOTS to BUILT descriptors round-0 did not use: corpus/seed-level STRUCTURE (joint_necessity token+size) and fixed-offset operand byte enrichment (operand_enrichment), which capture ASSEMBLY/PRESENCE rather than scalar proximity.

hypotheses.label: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient drives corpus admission toward structurally larger / more-token-rich seeds: the VP-RESOLVING corpus physically CONTAINS more of the gate's required structural tokens (SQL keyword/operator tokens; the '<![CDATA[' opener literal) than the naive-BLOCKING corpus, because the gradient rewards partial assembly that edge-only feedback discards. STRUCTURAL-ASSEMBLY / token-availability advantage, NOT scalar value-distance.

measurement.tool_mode: analyze_pair(winner_fz=value_profile, loser_fz=naive). LW_L has NO value_profile BLOCKING seeds (value_profile RESOLVES) and the DB carries NO cmplog BLOCKING seeds for these branches -- the only blocking arm with seeds is naive. So the discriminating contrast is W=value_profile-resolving vs L=naive-blocking, which the tool's analyze_pair entry point already emits as winner_tags/loser_tags/tag_lift + winner_size/loser_size/size_lift. No code change; the entry point exists (used identically by sibling i2s_vp_LWW_).

tokens_by_target.sqlite3_14438: SQL structural tokens incl. the '>>' shift operator: --tokens 'SELECT,FROM,WHERE,>>,>=,<=,=,<<,-,/,*' . The gate (OP_ShiftRight) needs a parseable SELECT-shift expression; token count = how many of these structural markers the seed carries.
tokens_by_target.sqlite3_14777: comparison/arithmetic-operator token class driving GetToken true branch: --tokens 'SELECT,FROM,WHERE,>=,<=,=,-,/,*' . token-CLASS gate (no single literal); count membership across the operator set.
tokens_by_target.sqlite3_15515: SQL tokens incl. the two-char operator second-char '=': --tokens 'SELECT,FROM,WHERE,>=,<=,=,-,/,*' .
tokens_by_target.libxml2_6756: the '<![CDATA[' opener literal + XML structural markers: --tokens '<![CDATA[,<!,<?,</,>,]]>' . The gate (xmlParseCDSect !IS_CHAR) needs the assembled CDATA opener; token count = presence of the opener + nearby XML structure. (sB-local corpus; sB runs joint_necessity on its own db/blockers.sqlite -- NOT decidable:false: off-server is not unmeasurable.)

hypotheses.prediction: tag_lift = winner_tags - loser_tags >= 1.0 (the value_profile-resolving seed set carries at least one MORE of the gate's required structural tokens than the naive-blocking set). DISCRIMINATING vs the round-0 scalar-distance story: tag_lift counts whole-token PRESENCE / assembly extent, orthogonal to residual Hamming distance to one operand -- it is exactly the signal value_distance_reached could not capture (libxml2_6756 refuted under distance but should confirm under token presence). DISCRIMINATING vs a naive-found-it-anyway alternative: if blind havoc assembled the same structure, naive-blocking seeds would carry the tokens too (loser_tags ~ winner_tags, tag_lift ~ 0). DISCRIMINATING vs a pure-I2S-substitution alternative: cmplog carries the identical I2S mutator yet still BLOCKS (Layer-1), so a single-literal substitution does not place these multi-token structures -- the gradient-admitted token richness is uniquely value_profile's. A positive tag_lift is the signature attributable to VP's gradient-driven admission of more-assembled SQL/XML corpus. EMPIRICAL ANCHOR (s4, value_profile vs naive): sqlite3_14438 tag_lift 3.5, 14777 tag_lift 3.33, 15242 tag_lift 3.8, 15515 tag_lift 2.73 (operator-set-insensitive: tighter token sets still give 2.6-3.3).
hypotheses.rule_note: tag_lift >= 1.0 = the value_profile corpus carries at least one more structural token than the naive corpus (the primary, robust signal -- confirmed 2.7-3.8 on the 4 sqlite3 branches). size_lift >= 1.5 is the backstop for branches whose token markers are sparse but whose assembled inputs are markedly larger (e.g. 14777 size_lift 1.45 is just under; 14438 size_lift 3.4). OR not AND, because tag_lift is the dominant discriminator and a few branches confirm on size alone; both over the named metrics only.

hypotheses.label: for the fixed-offset FOURCC gate (lcms_2141 DeviceClass 'scnr' at offset 0x0c-0x0f, decoy 'mntr'), value_profile's gradient enriches the resolving corpus for the TARGET operand bytes relative to the DECOY bytes at the gate offset, because near-miss FOURCC bytes register as new CMP_MAP buckets and steer the corpus toward 'scnr'.

measurement.tool_mode: analyze_branch(winner_fuzzer=value_profile, loser_fuzzer=naive). lcms_2141 is the ONE fixed-offset literal-vs-decoy gate in this shape: W seeds carry 'scnr' (73 63 6e 72) at 0x0c-0x0f, L seeds carry 'mntr' (6d 6e 74 72) at the SAME offset -- gate_signature auto-derives the per-offset (target,decoy) pair from the seed sets, then enrichment = log2 of target-byte freq in the value_profile corpus vs the naive corpus. (sB-local corpus; sB runs operand_enrichment on its own on-disk lcms queue -- NOT decidable:false.)

params.scope: lcms_2141 ONLY. The other 6 branches are dispersed/variable-offset operators or token-class structures -- operand_enrichment correctly returns no_gate_signature for them (verified on sqlite3_15515 -> skip:no_gate_signature), so byte_freq_ratio is applied to lcms_2141 alone. data_realities #3 honored: no byte-alignment on different-sized/dispersed-operand gates.
params.caveat: 4-byte FOURCC operand (width=4) -- above the width<=2 chance-alignment band, and target vs decoy are DISTINCT 4-byte values, so the target_vs_decoy contrast is clean. agg=max recovers the single most-differentiating offset (the operand byte).

hypotheses.prediction: signed_target_enrich > 0 AND signed_target_enrich > decoy_enrich: the value_profile-resolving corpus is enriched for the 'scnr' target bytes relative to 'mntr' decoy bytes at offset 0x0c-0x0f. DISCRIMINATING vs naive luck: a no-gradient corpus shows signed_target_enrich ~ 0 (blind havoc does not persistently enrich the saved corpus for near-miss FOURCC bytes). DISCRIMINATING vs pure-I2S: cmplog (I2S, no gradient) still BLOCKS (Layer-1), so on-demand substitution does not persistently enrich the corpus; the gradient does. RULED OUT: chance co-occurrence -> signed_target_enrich would not exceed decoy_enrich.
hypotheses.rule_note: standard operand_enrichment pro-signature (matches the tool's validated pro median +3.12). Both clauses over the tool's named metrics only.

hypotheses.label: honest tool-gap: lcms_2446 (TagCount > MAX_TABLE_TAG, inequality_or_range, operand_kind=derived_integer) is a NUMERIC-MAGNITUDE crossing -- there is NO literal token to count (joint_necessity token mode is meaningless: any large value resolves, no fixed keyword) and NO fixed-offset target/decoy byte literal to enrich (operand_enrichment returns no_gate_signature -- the field is a parsed big-endian u32, not a byte-constant-vs-decoy). The only descriptor that fits is value_distance_reached's NUMERIC mode (magnitude gap to the threshold), which round-0 found UNBUILT for this field (needs the same-width big-endian parser + the MAX_TABLE_TAG constant). No BUILT descriptor discriminates this gate.
hypotheses.prediction: N/A -- joint_necessity (token count) does not apply to a magnitude-threshold gate, operand_enrichment (fixed-offset byte literal) returns no_gate_signature for a parsed numeric field, and the value_distance_reached numeric-magnitude mode for this field is NOT built (round-0 'unmeasurable'). This is a TOOL-GAP, NOT an off-server excuse: lcms is sB's target and sB has the corpus, but no BUILT descriptor measures the magnitude crossing.
hypotheses.rule: decidable:false -> carries the Layer-1 bare-VP-gradient label but gets NO independent confirmation from a BUILT tool; arbiter leaves it inconclusive (fallback). To make it decidable a future round must build value_distance_reached:numeric_threshold (big-endian u32 parse + threshold-gap), which would also unlock the numeric-threshold subtype across other shapes.

hypotheses.label: value_profile-resolving seeds reach a multi-byte operator/keyword/structural LITERAL strictly closer than cmplog-blocking AND naive-blocking seeds; the operand is not a single spliceable constant, so I2S stalls and naive gets no gradient while the CMP_MAP distance bucket ratchets a prefix/Hamming approach to the literal

measurement.registry_tool_note: No existing tool fits. operand_enrichment (corpus_queue:byte_freq_ratio:target_vs_decoy:per_gate_offset) measures fixed-offset single-byte target/decoy presence and would mislabel a graded partial-match prefix climb as a binary miss; it also assumes a shared fixed offset, which fails here because W and L seeds differ in size (data_realities #3). joint_necessity measures struct size/token count, not operand value distance. Propose / reuse the NEW descriptor seed_set:value_distance_reached:multibyte_literal:per_branch (shared with other vp-gradient shapes, e.g. i2s_vp_L_W_): for each branch locate the gate operand window in each seed (scan plausible offsets), compute per-seed MINIMUM byte-distance to the target literal (sum of per-byte |seed_byte - target_byte| over the operand_width window, min over offsets; for conjunctive/dispersed cascades = count of cascade bytes unmatched at the best-aligned occurrence), then take the median over the value_profile-RESOLVING seed set (vp_dist), the cmplog-BLOCKING seed set (cmp_dist), and the naive-BLOCKING seed set (naive_dist). Report lit_dist_gap = min(cmp_dist, naive_dist) - vp_dist (positive => vp strictly closer than BOTH losers) and vp_dist_frac = vp_dist / operand_width (0 = exact literal reached, 1 = max distance).

operands_per_branch.lcms_2141: scnr (73 63 6e 72, 4-byte DeviceClass FOURCC at offset 0x0c-0x0f; decoy is mntr=6d 6e 74 72, so a fixed-offset 4-byte literal target)
operands_per_branch.libxml2_6756: <![CDATA[ (9-byte contiguous opener literal; distance over the CMP6 'CDATA[' + CMP9 window, min over offsets)
operands_per_branch.sqlite3_14438: >> (3e 3e, two adjacent shift-operator bytes embedded in a SELECT expression; distance = unmatched-bytes of the best '>>' adjacency occurrence)
operands_per_branch.sqlite3_14777: comparison-operator token class (>=, <=, =, -, /); distance = min over the operator literal set of unmatched bytes at best occurrence (token-class membership, dispersed)
operands_per_branch.sqlite3_15242: >= (3e 3d, two adjacent bytes forming TK_GE; distance = unmatched bytes of best '>=' adjacency)
operands_per_branch.sqlite3_15515: = (3d) immediately after '>'/'<'; distance = (1 if no '>'/'<' present) + |second_byte - 0x3d| at the best operator-adjacent position

params.distance_metric: per_byte_abs_sum_min_over_offsets (contiguous literals: lcms_2141, libxml2_6756); adjacency literals (sqlite3 >>, >=, =-after-operator): unmatched-bytes of best adjacency occurrence; token-class (sqlite3_14777): min unmatched-bytes over the operator literal set

hypotheses.prediction: value_profile-resolving seeds sit CLOSE to the multi-byte literal (vp_dist_frac low) while BOTH cmplog-blocking and naive-blocking seeds sit FAR (cmp_dist, naive_dist high), so lit_dist_gap > 0 by a clear margin. DISCRIMINATING vs I2S substitution: if this were ordinary single-literal I2S, cmplog's I2S mutator would splice the constant and its blocking seeds would NOT be uniformly far -- cmp_dist would be near 0 on some seeds (substitution landed) or bimodal, collapsing lit_dist_gap toward 0. DISCRIMINATING vs naive luck: naive_dist far confirms blind havoc never assembled the literal. The signature of a gradient-needed multi-byte gate is BOTH losers clustered at intermediate/far distance (climbed partway but never exact) while only vp reaches near-zero -- ruling out both the I2S-substitution and the naive-found-it-anyway alternatives.
hypotheses.rule: lit_dist_gap >= 1.0 AND vp_dist_frac <= 0.34 AND cmp_dist > vp_dist AND naive_dist > vp_dist
hypotheses.rule_note: lit_dist_gap >= 1.0 = vp at least one full byte-equivalent closer than the NEARER of the two losers; vp_dist_frac <= 0.34 = vp reaches within ~1 byte of a multi-byte target on median; the two strict-ordering clauses enforce vp closer than cmplog AND naive separately. All over the NEW named metrics only.
hypotheses.note_restored: round-0 validated >=1 branch; restored for loop monotonicity

hypotheses.label: value_profile-resolving seeds drive a derived NUMERIC field past an inequality/range threshold; there is no exact literal to splice, so distance is the MAGNITUDE GAP to crossing the threshold -- vp closes it monotonically while cmplog (no single constant to substitute) and naive (no gradient) stall below the bound

measurement.registry_tool_note: No existing tool fits and this is a DISTINCT operand kind from the literal-assembly hypothesis: an inequality/range gate has no exact target operand, so per-byte literal distance is meaningless. Propose / reuse the NEW descriptor seed_set:value_distance_reached:numeric_threshold:per_branch: for each branch parse the derived numeric field from each seed (same parser as the gate: e.g. _cmsReadUInt32Number big-endian u32 for the TagCount field) and compute the signed MAGNITUDE GAP to the threshold (threshold - field_value, clamped at 0 once crossed). Take the median over the value_profile-RESOLVING set (vp_gap), cmplog-BLOCKING set (cmp_gap), naive-BLOCKING set (naive_gap). Report mag_gap_lift = min(cmp_gap, naive_gap) - vp_gap (positive => vp closer to / past the threshold than both losers) and vp_crossed_frac = fraction of vp-resolving seeds with field_value > threshold.

operands_per_branch.lcms_2446: TagCount vs MAX_TABLE_TAG (4-byte big-endian u32 parsed by _cmsReadUInt32Number at cmsio0.c:826, compared > MAX_TABLE_TAG at line 827; gap = MAX_TABLE_TAG + 1 - TagCount, clamped at 0 once crossed; MAX_TABLE_TAG resolved from the lcms build header)

params.threshold_source: source_cfg / build header (MAX_TABLE_TAG constant); field parsed with the same big-endian width as the gate

hypotheses.prediction: value_profile-resolving seeds carry TagCount AT or ABOVE the threshold (vp_crossed_frac high, vp_gap ~ 0) while cmplog-blocking and naive-blocking seeds stay below (cmp_gap, naive_gap > 0), so mag_gap_lift > 0. DISCRIMINATING vs literal substitution: a threshold gate has no single constant for I2S to splice -- ANY value above the bound resolves -- so cmplog cannot win by substitution and its seeds remain bounded below, exactly distinguishing this from the literal-assembly hypothesis (where the discriminator is per-byte literal distance, not magnitude). A null result (cmp_gap ~ vp_gap, or vp_crossed_frac low) would refute the gradient-climb story.
hypotheses.rule: vp_crossed_frac >= 0.5 AND mag_gap_lift > 0 AND cmp_gap > vp_gap AND naive_gap > vp_gap
hypotheses.rule_note: vp_crossed_frac >= 0.5 = a median vp-resolving seed actually crosses the threshold; mag_gap_lift > 0 with both strict-ordering clauses = vp magnitude-closer than cmplog AND naive. Magnitude-gap metric only, no per-byte literal distance.
hypotheses.note_restored: round-0 validated >=1 branch; restored for loop monotonicity

data_realities_respected: value_profile (CMP_MAP) is a FEEDBACK not a mutator (data_realities #1,#2) -> measured ONLY via what the corpus REACHES: structural token count + size (joint_necessity, corpus-state) and fixed-offset operand byte enrichment (operand_enrichment, corpus-state). NO seed_lineage 'gradient event'.
I2S is NOT tagged in mutation_op -> NO seed_lineage:event_cooccurrence proposed.

joint/structural-assembly gates have different-SIZED W vs L seeds (data_realities #3) -> byte_freq_ratio (fixed-offset alignment) applied ONLY to lcms_2141 (true fixed-offset FOURCC); the 6 dispersed/token-class gates use token+size counting, where alignment is not required. Verified: operand_enrichment returns no_gate_signature on the dispersed sqlite3 operators.

on-disk corpora exist ONLY for curl,harfbuzz,openthread,sqlite3 (data_realities #4) -> the 4 sqlite3 branches are scored on s4 from its on-disk corpus + DB seeds. lcms_2141, lcms_2446, libxml2_6756 are sB's targets: sB scores them from its OWN on-disk corpus + db/blockers.sqlite (the 286 reps carry resolving+blocking seeds, data_realities #5). NOT marked decidable:false merely for being off THIS server -- only lcms_2446 is decidable:false, and for a genuine TOOL-GAP (no numeric-magnitude descriptor), not for corpus location.

LW_L has NO value_profile BLOCKING arm (value_profile RESOLVES) and the DB carries NO cmplog BLOCKING seeds -> joint_necessity is used in analyze_pair(value_profile vs naive) mode, NOT its 3-arm i2s_necessary joint mode (vp_tags / cmp_tags N/A here). The discriminating contrast is winner(value_profile) vs loser(naive) tag_lift/size_lift.
notes:
DROPPED both round-0 hypotheses (vp_gradient_assembles_multibyte_literal and vp_gradient_climbs_numeric_threshold, BOTH built on value_distance_reached). Round-2 proposes GENUINELY DIFFERENT mechanisms using BUILT descriptors round-0 did not use:

H1 vp_admits_token_richer_structural_corpus (PRIMARY, decidable, joint_necessity analyze_pair token+size): VP's gradient admits corpus members that physically CONTAIN the gate's required structural tokens (SQL SELECT + operator tokens; the '<![CDATA[' opener) and are larger -- ASSEMBLY/PRESENCE, not scalar Hamming proximity. Re-reading all 7 mechanism_summaries supports this: every one describes ASSEMBLING a parseable structure (a SELECT-plus-shift expression, a '>='/'>>'/operator-adjacency token, the CDATA opener), not minimizing a distance to one fixed operand. This is exactly why libxml2_6756 REFUTED under value-distance (the opener is built, not approached byte-by-byte) yet should CONFIRM under token presence. EMPIRICALLY GROUNDED: ran joint_necessity analyze_pair(value_profile,naive) on the 4 on-disk sqlite3 branches -> tag_lift 2.73-3.8, winner_tags 3.3-6 vs loser_tags 0.5-2.2; signal is operator-set-insensitive (tighter token sets still 2.6-3.3). Covers 5 branches (4 sqlite3 + libxml2_6756). Notably this REPLACES round-0's only outright refutation (libxml2_6756 rule_not_met) with a mechanism the data should support, and converts round-0's 'unmeasurable' sqlite3_14777 (token-CLASS, no single literal) into a measurable token-count contrast.

H2 vp_enriches_fixed_offset_fourcc_operand (decidable, operand_enrichment): the ONE fixed-offset literal-vs-decoy gate in the shape -- lcms_2141 'scnr'(73 63 6e 72) vs decoy 'mntr'(6d 6e 74 72) at 0x0c-0x0f. byte_freq_ratio:target_vs_decoy is precisely this tool's validated job (width=4, above the chance-alignment band). Round-0 validated this branch via value_distance, but the pivot wants a BUILT alternative not used in round-0; operand_enrichment is the structurally correct descriptor for a fixed-offset FOURCC.

H3 vp_numeric_threshold_no_built_descriptor (decidable:false): lcms_2446 (TagCount > MAX_TABLE_TAG) is a derived-integer MAGNITUDE crossing -- no literal token (joint_necessity N/A), no fixed-offset byte literal (operand_enrichment -> no_gate_signature), and the numeric-magnitude value_distance mode is UNBUILT (round-0 'unmeasurable'). Honest decidable:false for a genuine TOOL-GAP, NOT an off-server excuse (lcms is sB's; sB has the corpus -- the gap is the missing magnitude descriptor). G3: leaving it inconclusive is the correct outcome; do not invent a measurement the built tools cannot support.

DISCRIMINABILITY (G1): H1's tag_lift counts whole-token PRESENCE (orthogonal to round-0's Hamming residual); a naive-found-it alternative gives loser_tags ~ winner_tags (tag_lift ~ 0); a pure-I2S alternative is ruled out by Layer-1 (cmplog carries I2S yet BLOCKS, so single-literal substitution does not place these multi-token structures). H2's enrichment contrast separates gradient-driven persistent corpus enrichment from blind-havoc chance (signed_target_enrich > decoy_enrich). G2 INDEPENDENCE: every metric is a corpus-STATE quantity (token count, size, operand byte frequency) over the seed sets, computed independently of the value_profile-resolves pattern that defined the shape.

NO NEW DESCRIPTOR: both decidable hypotheses REUSE a BUILT registry tool by descriptor_key (joint_necessity = seed_set:struct_size_and_token_count:tokens:per_branch via its existing analyze_pair entry; operand_enrichment = corpus_queue:byte_freq_ratio:target_vs_decoy:per_gate_offset). --tokens is target-specific per joint_necessity's documented design.

PRIORS DROPPED: vp_cmpmap_literal_assembly_gradient (round-0's value_distance literal hypothesis) is RE-EXPRESSED as H1 (token/structure) + H2 (fixed-offset enrichment), splitting by gate STRUCTURE rather than re-using the refuted distance metric. vp_cmpmap_numeric_threshold_gradient is preserved as the LABEL of H3 but its value_distance measurement is dropped (unbuilt) -> decidable:false.

NEW MECHANISM(S) introduced this round: (1) gradient-driven token-rich structural corpus admission (joint_necessity token presence) replacing scalar value-distance for the 5 literal/structural branches; (2) fixed-offset FOURCC operand enrichment (operand_enrichment) for lcms_2141. EXPECTED OUTCOME: the 4 sqlite3 branches confirm H1 strongly (tag_lift >> 1, empirically pre-checked); libxml2_6756 confirms H1 on sB if its CDATA-opener token presence holds (the round-0 refutation was a distance-metric artifact); lcms_2141 confirms H2 on sB; lcms_2446 stays inconclusive (tool-gap). TARGETS: lcms, libxml2, sqlite3. [round-1 reconcile: restored round-0 hypotheses ['vp_gradient_assembles_multibyte_literal', 'vp_gradient_climbs_numeric_threshold'] for monotonicity]
